---
title: "Analysis of COVID data"
author: "Marta Mainetti"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    df-print: paged
---


# Import libraries and prepare setting

```{r, warning = FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(medicaldata)
```


# Load data



# Preliminary analysis

# Data visualization

# Conclusion
